title: Obama Presidential Library: Targeted Search: Gali District Disenfranchisement (2014)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all records, including emails (sent, received, CC’d, or BCC’d) and their attachments, created between April 1, 2014, and January 20, 2015, that discuss the disenfranchisement and "passportization" of ethnic Georgians in the Gali district of Abkhazia.

To ensure a comprehensive search of the National Security Council (NSC) and Department of State records, please include the following individuals and their associated email handles/aliases in your query:

1. Primary Department of State Targets:

Tom Malinowski (Assistant Secretary, DRL): malinowskit@state.gov, malinowskitp@state.gov, and any alias associated with "A/S Malinowski."
Richard Norland (Ambassador to Georgia): norlandr@state.gov, norlandrc@state.gov, and any alias associated with "Ambassador Norland" or "COM Tbilisi."
Eric Rubin (Deputy Assistant Secretary, EUR): rubine@state.gov.

2. National Security Council (NSC) Targets:

Celeste Wallander (Senior Director for Russia and Central Asia): cwallander@nsc.eop.gov.
Charles Kupchan (Senior Director for European Affairs): ckupchan@nsc.eop.gov.
Elizabeth Sherwood-Randall (White House Coordinator for Defense Policy and Arms Control): esherwood-randall@nsc.eop.gov.

NSC Records Management: Search for all records within the "Europe and Eurasia Directorate" and the "International Organizations and Alliance Directorate."

3. Specific Subject Matter Keywords & Metadata:
Please perform a keyword search against the "Subject" and "Body" fields of the above accounts for:

Gali AND Passport* (to include passportization/passports)
Ankvab AND Khajimba
Abkhaz* AND Disenfranchis*
Surkov AND Abkhaz*
Gali Georgians
IDP status
Аԥсны Аҳәынҭқарра 
Республика Абхазия

4. Search Constraints:
I request that the search include both the Open (Unclassified) Side and the Classified Side (SIPRNet/JWICS) records for the requested period. If any records are withheld under a (b)(1) national security exemption, I request a Vaughn Index describing the withheld material and the justification for the exemption.

Thank you to the Obama Presidential Library for the library's commitment to transparency.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robert Delaware
